'?' : location.search;if (window.history && window.history.replaceState) {var ogU = location.pathname + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUQuery + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash;history.replaceState(null, null,"/rss.xml?__cf_chl_rt_tk=ZM3Ugtk_9T_ZXL5LmQ1DQLfj4MoiZPbVFWCRAPv0qRw-1774636086-1.0.1.1-Y1ehI8.sS8IplL2cz6Rq0o2XAMzA35GHuUaugrJfksM"+ window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash);a.onload = function() {history.replaceState(null, null, ogU);}}document.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(a);}());
